## Checklist

- [ ] Does one thing (matches one task)
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or tokens in the diff
- [ ] If this adds a DB table: **RLS is enabled** and policies exist in the same migration
- [ ] If this changes who can see what: **tested as a second user** who should *not* have access
- [ ] Notion task updated (status + Actual hrs)
